name: Melton Mustafa
abstract: Melton "Shakir" Mustafa Sr. (November 23, 1947 – December 28, 2017) was an American jazz trumpeter, flugelhorn player, composer, arranger, and music educator.

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Nancy Wilson, Singer, and Joe Williams, Singer, with The Count Basie Orchestra
Carnegie Hall Jazz Band: Count Basie Revisited: 1936-1994

about_quotes.speaker: Frank Foster and Bill Hughes
about_quotes.evidence: we had a trumpet battle between Bob Ojeda and the very brilliant Melton Mustafa
about_quotes.doc_title: Frank Foster and Bill Hughes interviewed by Monk Rowe and Michael Woods, Schenectady, New York, March 28, 1995
